text: Who's that? It's Peter. What's your name? Iya? Alina? Oh. Are you sure you're not Peter? Tell me your name again. What is it? Your name's not Peter. What's your name? Is your name Tongue? What's your name? What's your name? Is your name George? Is uh is it mommy? Is it daddy? Is it Sherman? Is it no no? What's your name? Good job. Say night night.
